name: Unbound Security
description: Unbound Security — MPC-based key management and cryptographic asset security acquired by Coinbase.

seo.title: Unbound Security — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Unbound Security: Unbound Security — MPC-based key management and cryptographic asset security acquired by Coinbase.

when_to_use: MPC-based cryptographic key management for crypto custody
Distributed key generation without single point of compromise
Digital asset security for institutional custodians
Secure multi-party signing for enterprise crypto workflows
Key lifecycle management with HSM-equivalent security

review.verdict: Technically interesting MPC KMS, but its status as a generally-available product is murky post-Coinbase.
review.best_for: Teams with existing Unbound relationships or crypto-heavy custody needs.
review.not_for: Anyone expecting a standard commercial KMS procurement path.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
